name: Clearfield, Inc.
business: Clearfield designs, manufactures, and distributes fiber protection, fiber management, and fiber delivery solutions for broadband service providers primarily in North America. The company's products enable rapid fiber-fed deployment, and its portfolio includes FieldSmart, CraftSmart, FiberFlex, FieldShield, and other fiber connectivity products. The company sells to Community Broadband, MSO/Cable TV, Large Regional Service Providers, National Carriers, and International customers.
sellsTo: Community Broadband (Tier 2 and 3 telco carriers, utilities, municipalities, alternative carriers)
Large Regional Service Providers (ILEC with >500k subscribers)
National Carriers (wireline/wireless national telco carriers Tier 1)
International (primarily Canada, Caribbean, Central/South America, Mexico)

exposures.sentence: We design, manufacture, and distribute fiber protection, fiber management, and fiber delivery solutions to enable rapid and cost-effective fiber-fed deployment throughout the broadband service provider space primarily across North America.
Broadband Service Provider Data Center Infrastructure DC Interconnect/Campus Network Fiber entry pathways supporting carrier access, campus links, and data center interconnection.
